exit_load_bullets: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
Nil exit load if redeemed after 1 year from the date of allotment.
Exit load of 1% is deducted from the redemption amount at the prevailing NAV.
No exit load (Nil) — redemption is free at any time.
ELSS funds have a mandatory 3-year statutory lock-in; units cannot be redeemed before lock-in ends.
After the lock-in period, redemption proceeds are credited at the prevailing NAV.
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
Nil exit load if redeemed after 15 day from the date of allotment.
Exit load of 1% is deducted from the redemption amount at the prevailing NAV.
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Nil exit load if redeemed after the specified period from the date of allotment.
Exit load of applicable is deducted from the redemption amount at the prevailing NAV.

Nil exit load if redeemed after 15 day from the date of allotment.
